name: vectora
description: Vectora: plataforma self-service para evaluar qué LLM conviene por caso de uso

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vectora/probe && npm run build -w @vectora/server
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @vectora/probe && concurrently -n server,client,demo-bot,demo-fraude -c green,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:client" "npm:dev:demo-bot" "npm:dev:demo-fraude"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w @vectora/probe && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
